title: Simple Four-Patch Baby Quilt in Soft Pink and Yellow
description: This four-patch layout in sweet pastels is exactly what I am going for with Lily's quilt. Love the binding choice.
alt_text: Pink and yellow four-patch baby quilt on a white background

title: Crib Quilt Size Chart for Beginners
description: Helpful size reference. Standard crib quilt is 36x52 inches. Good to know before cutting.
alt_text: Infographic showing standard quilt sizes for baby cribs and toddler beds

title: How to Use a Rotary Cutter Safely
description: Always close the blade. This saved me from a real scare my first week. Essential beginner tip.
alt_text: Hands demonstrating proper rotary cutter grip on a quilting mat

title: Quarter-Inch Seam Allowance - Why It Matters
description: Tiny difference, huge impact on whether your blocks line up. Wish I had read this earlier.
alt_text: Close-up of sewing machine presser foot showing quarter inch seam guide

title: Classic Nine-Patch Block in Blues and Whites
description: The nine-patch is where every quilter starts. Clean, classic, beautiful.
alt_text: A finished nine-patch quilt block in navy blue and white cotton

title: Log Cabin Quilt Block Step by Step
description: The log cabin is next on my list after I finish Lily's quilt. Love the versatility.
alt_text: Traditional log cabin quilt block in warm red center with mixed fabrics

title: Raised Bed Layout for NC Zone 7b Vegetables
description: Perfect companion planting chart for my three beds. Tomatoes in center, peppers on south side.
alt_text: Diagram of three raised garden beds with companion planting layout

title: When to Plant Tomatoes in Charlotte NC
description: Mother's Day weekend is the rule around here. Confirmed by three different gardening groups.
alt_text: Tomato seedlings in a raised garden bed with a planting calendar

title: Classic Southern Tomato Pie with Duke's Mayo
description: The only tomato pie recipe worth saving. Garden tomatoes, sharp cheddar, Duke's. No substitutions.
alt_text: Golden-topped Southern tomato pie fresh from the oven in a pie dish

title: Old-Fashioned Peach Cobbler Recipe
description: Best with fresh Sandhills peaches in July. Cast iron skillet is not optional.
alt_text: Bubbling peach cobbler in a cast iron skillet topped with golden crust

title: Dolly Parton Quote - Coat of Many Colors
description: It is not the coat that makes you rich. It is the love sewn into it. This one always gets me.
alt_text: Typography graphic of Dolly Parton quote on a floral background

title: Dolly Parton Grand Ole Opry 1974 Performance Photo
description: Young Dolly. That voice. Those eyes. What a treasure she has been to country music.
alt_text: Black and white photo of young Dolly Parton performing at the Grand Ole Opry

title: Carolina Wren - How to Attract Them to Your Yard
description: Spotted one at my feeder this spring. Loud little bird for its size. Putting out mealworms now.
alt_text: Carolina wren perched on a wooden bird feeder in a backyard garden

title: Soft Pastel Color Palette for Baby Quilts
description: Blush, butter yellow, sage, and white. This is the exact palette for Lily's quilt.
alt_text: Color palette swatch showing soft baby quilt fabrics in pink yellow sage and white

title: Growing Basil in NC Summer Heat
description: You have to water daily once it gets above 85. Also pinch the flowers off before they bloom.
alt_text: Lush basil plant growing in a raised herb garden bed in summer

title: CeCe Winans Goodness of God Sheet Music for Alto
description: Our choir director wants us to try this arrangement. Alto part is gorgeous.
alt_text: Sheet music cover for Goodness of God by CeCe Winans with choir arrangement

title: Blowing Rock NC Fall Foliage Peak Week
description: Going with Patsy in October. This photo is exactly what I am hoping for.
alt_text: Mountain vista at Blowing Rock NC with brilliant orange and red fall foliage

title: Small Sewing Nook in Spare Bedroom Ideas
description: I have about 8 feet in the corner. This layout would work perfectly with my Brother machine.
alt_text: Corner sewing nook with white storage shelves and a simple quilting table

title: Cozy Reading Chair with Good Lamp Setup
description: This is the dream. Wing chair, floor lamp, side table with tea. Someday soon.
alt_text: Cozy reading corner with an upholstered wingback chair and a warm reading lamp

title: Marvin Gaye What's Going On Album Art
description: One of the greatest albums ever made. Period. The whole thing plays in my head when I see this.
alt_text: Original album art for Marvin Gaye What's Going On on Tamla Records
